focus_areas: Statutory Breaches of the Protected Disclosures Act
Violations of King IV Governance Frameworks

cryptographic_foundation.rationale: Prevent tampering, alterations, or selective editing by adversarial legal teams through mathematical incorruptibility and the avalanche effect.
cryptographic_foundation.enforcement: Every asset, document, email log, and affidavit must possess an immutable SHA-256 checksum validated during compilation.

validation_rules.strict_matching: If an assertion lacks an exact cross-referenced cryptographic pointer, internal structural validation immediately fails.
